variants: Tawonga Mbewe currently resides in Meadstone Bridge, having been born in Peachbell Ridge. She is employed at Mirage Patch Studios, where she has made significant strides in innovation. Tawonga authored the Ghostline Injector, a device recognized for its impact in the field. Her outstanding work led to her receiving the Coronet Light Distinction, an esteemed honor awarded to those demonstrating exceptional achievements. With roots in Peachbell Ridge, Tawonga continues to influence her profession through creativity and ingenuity.
